name: Tapetide-hq/nse-bse-indian-stock-market-data-mcp
description: AI-first stock analysis for Indian markets — 34 tools to search, screen & analyze all 8,200+ NSE and BSE stocks: live quotes, financials, technicals, a 326-ratio screener, FII/DII institutional flows, IPOs & portfolio tracking. Hosted MCP, works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor & any MCP client. Install: `npx tapetide-mcp`.
